offers.title: Horizon'd Wrap
offers.description: Let your gear know: a brand new wrap is on the horizon'd. Claim the Horizon'd Wrap.

offers.title: Gravity [NULL]
offers.description: Who needs gravity? Not us. Fight through armies of robots, find upgrades to grow stronger, and send those clankers where they belong.

offers.title: Fall Guys
offers.description: Fall Guys is a free, cross-platform massively multiplayer party royale game. Clumsily compete in absurd obstacle courses with friends or build your very own chaotic course to share with the community.

offers.title: Blades of Fire Adventurer Pack
offers.description: The Adventurer Pack adds the exclusive Iron Paladin and Lord of Steel attires for Aran, the Hammer Head for the Hyssop weapon, and additional forging materials.

offers.title: Firestone Mega Giveaway
offers.description: This giveaway will be active until 11/06/2026. Claim it before it disappears!

offers.title: Firestone Online Idle RPG
offers.description: Firestone: Online Idle RPG is a multiplayer fantasy game with idle rpg mechanics. Collect heroes🧙‍♂️, upgrade their gear & skills, and sent them in AFK battles or go on an incremental clicker frenzy to beat monstrous bosses! Chat with guild friends or engage in PVP⚔️.

offers.title: Tasslehoff's Dragonlance Party Pack
offers.description:
This pack unlocks the first 3 Champions from the classic Dragonlance novels: Raistlin, Tasslehoff, and Laurana.

Also included are 14 Platinum Champion Chests for each of those Champions, and a week-long Gem Hunter Potion! 

Take your game to the next level with this Party Pack!

offers.title: Rocket League® - Triplex Black Wheels
offers.description: Celebrate the Epic Games MEGA Sale and get the Triplex Black Wheels FOR FREE!

offers.title: Arranger: A Role-Puzzling Adventure
offers.description: Find your way in a world of breezy, thoughtful puzzles, along a charming journey of self-discovery.
